content_body: Enjoy exclusive river trips and other hosted tours, complete with kayak or canoe rentals.  You can enjoy a day on the river on your own or with our experienced guide host. The Toccoa is just a fun river for a great day adventure whether you are interested in just floating or fishing.  We can put you in the prime spots on the river, which are inaccessible by road.  We have to sit on top and sit in kayaks, and we have canoes.  The great thing about sit-on-top kayaks is that you don't have to have experience -  they are easy to handle with just minimal instruction.  The run we do most is from Dial Road (above Vanzandt's Store) to Sandy Bottom.  This is about two hours on the water and is a very good stretch of river for beginners.  The run from Deep Hole to Sandy Bottom is a full-day adventure, and you will need to plan five to seven hours on the water - this depends on whether you are a paddler or doing a lazy day of fishing.   This can also be affected by the water level and conditions.  We can adjust the float based on the time you want to spend on the river.    We will cater to your needs, ensuring you a fun and enjoyable time. Contact us today!
title: Jon Ron Toccoa River Outfitters
